# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent cicd security.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  PIP_CACHE_DIR: "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache/pip"
  DOCKER_DRIVER: overlay2
  SECURE_FILES_DOWNLOAD_PATH: './'

cache:
  paths:
    - .cache/pip
    - venv/

before_script:
  - python --version
  - pip install --upgrade pip

test:
  stage: test
  image: python:3.11-slim
  before_script:
    - python -m venv venv
    - source venv/bin/activate
    - pip install --upgrade pip
    - pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
  script:
    - pip install pytest pytest-cov bandit safety
    - pytest --cov=. --cov-report=xml --cov-report=term
    - bandit -r . -f json -o bandit-report.json || true
    - safety check --json --output safety-report.json || true
  artifacts:
    reports:
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage.xml
    paths:
      - bandit-report.json
      - safety-report.json
    expire_in: 1 week
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

security_scan:
  stage: test
  image: python:3.11-slim
  before_script:
    - pip install --upgrade pip
    - pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt
  script:
    - pip install pip-audit
    - pip-audit --desc --format json --output pip-audit-report.json || true
    - pip install semgrep
    - semgrep --config=auto --json --output=semgrep-report.json . || true
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - pip-audit-report.json
      - semgrep-report.json
    expire_in: 1 week
  allow_failure: true
  only:
    - branches
    - merge_requests

build:
  stage: build
  image: docker:24-dind
  services:
    - docker:24-dind
  before_script:
    - docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY
  script:
    - docker build --no-cache --pull -t $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA .
    - docker tag $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest
    - docker scan $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA || true
    - docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA
    - docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest
  only:
    - main
    - master
    - tags

deploy_staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - ssh-keyscan -H $STAGING_SERVER >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - ssh $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER "docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY"
    - ssh $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER "docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA"
    - ssh $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER "docker stop app-staging || true"
    - ssh $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER "docker rm app-staging || true"
    - ssh $STAGING_USER@$STAGING_SERVER "docker run -d --name app-staging --restart unless-stopped -p 8000:8000 --env-file /opt/app/.env.staging $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA"
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - main
    - master

deploy_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_PROD" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - ssh-keyscan -H $PRODUCTION_SERVER >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
    - chmod 644 ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "docker login -u $CI_REGISTRY_USER -p $CI_REGISTRY_PASSWORD $CI_REGISTRY"
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "docker pull $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA"
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "docker stop app-production || true"
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "docker rm app-production || true"
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "docker run -d --name app-production --restart unless-stopped -p 80:8000 --env-file /opt/app/.env.production $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$CI_COMMIT_SHA"
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  when: manual
  only:
    - tags
    - main
    - master

rollback_production:
  stage: deploy
  image: alpine:latest
  before_script:
    - apk add --no-cache openssh-client
    - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
    - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY_PROD" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add -
    - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
    - chmod 700 ~/.ssh
    - ssh-keyscan -H $PRODUCTION_SERVER >> ~/.ssh/known_hosts
  script:
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "docker stop app-production"
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "docker rm app-production"
    - ssh $PRODUCTION_USER@$PRODUCTION_SERVER "docker run -d --name app-production --restart unless-stopped -p 80:8000 --env-file /opt/app/.env.production $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$ROLLBACK_TAG"
  environment:
    name: production
    action: rollback
  when: manual
  only:
    - main
    - master
